memberdef.definition: using faiss::pq_code_distance::IVFPQScannerT< IDType, METRIC_TYPE, PQCodeDist >::PQDecoder = typename PQCodeDist::PQDecoder
memberdef.name: PQDecoder

memberdef.definition: const uint8_t* faiss::pq_code_distance::IVFPQScannerT< IDType, METRIC_TYPE, PQCodeDist >::list_codes
memberdef.name: list_codes

memberdef.definition: const IDType* faiss::pq_code_distance::IVFPQScannerT< IDType, METRIC_TYPE, PQCodeDist >::list_ids
memberdef.name: list_ids

briefdescription.para: version of the scan where we use precomputed tables.

detaileddescription.para: tables are not precomputed, but pointers are provided to the relevant X_c|x_r tables

briefdescription.para: nothing is precomputed: access residuals on-the-fly

detaileddescription.para: once we know the query and the centroid, we can prepare the sim_table that will be used for accumulation and dis0, the initial value
